summary: Iteration 24 - Server-side keyword search and virtual scrolling features tested successfully. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend search with 300ms debounce working. Virtual scrolling with react-window FixedSizeList (ROW_HEIGHT=52, MAX_VISIBLE=50) confirmed working with proper height calculation (2600px container). Row click navigation to paper detail page works correctly.

backend: GET /api/leaderboard?category=cs.RO&period=week&search=robot returns filtered results with 'robot' in title
Search results have correct re-ranked ranks starting from 1
GET /api/leaderboard?category=cs.RO&period=all (no search) returns all papers as before
Search with tags does not expose _full_data in API response
Response time for search queries is under 200ms (measured ~50ms)
Search with show_all=true response time under 300ms
Search is case-insensitive (robot/ROBOT/Robot return same results)
Search works with week period filter
Search works with month period filter
Search works with limit and offset pagination
frontend: Leaderboard page loads with category tabs, period filters, search input, and data table
Search 'robot' shows filtered results after debounce delay (~300ms)
Search results message shows 'Showing X papers matching "robot"'
Virtual scrolling renders rows correctly (50 max visible at 2600px height)
Scrolling within virtualized list shows different row indices
Row click navigates to /paper/{id} detail page
Paper detail page displays correctly with title, authors, abstract
Category switching works correctly (Robotics → Distributed Computing)

critical_code_review_comments: _apply_search() helper correctly filters by title and re-ranks results
Search applied AFTER cache lookup but BEFORE pagination - efficient implementation
Frontend debounce (300ms) implemented correctly via debouncedKeyword state
react-window FixedSizeList with ROW_HEIGHT=52 and MAX_VISIBLE=50 working correctly
Row navigation uses useNavigate() with onClick handler - proper React Router integration
seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing production data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 verified server-side keyword search and virtual scrolling. Search param works with category, show_all, and tags queries. Response times under 200ms. Virtual scrolling uses react-window v1.8.10 FixedSizeList with 52px row height and 50 max visible rows (2600px container). Frontend debounce is 300ms. Row clicks use useNavigate() for paper detail navigation.
